shadow_event.query:
codex context meter 删除掉； 
新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要
tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要
果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要

transcript.content: 已经接上了。 我改了两层：
为什么 和 Project Assistant 有关系？
因为我刚才找到并能直接修改的“状态栏宿主代码”，不是 OpenAI 官方 Codex 扩展本体，而是你本机装的这个扩展： - `~/.codex/skills/project-assistant/integrations/vscode-host/extension.js`
单独做，不要碰assitant 要有边界；
单独扩展已经做了，而且 `Project Assistant` 那边的误接线我已经撤回了。 现在机器上多了一个独立 VS Code 扩展：
这两个做重了吧，应该合并成1个； 先简短展示，点击后，出一个小窗口，在展示详情； 可以自己动态更新的； live pannel.md可以去除掉了；
已经按你说的收成一条了： - `Project Assistant` 的接线我撤回了 - 改成一个独立扩展 `Codex Context Monitor` - 状态栏现在应该只做 `简短展示` - 点击后打开 `小窗口详情` - 详情窗口会跟着后台轮询自动更新 - `live-panel.md` 已经删掉，不再作为主入口
打开新窗口后 Codex Context Monitor 会自动更新到新窗口么？
会，但有边界。 按现在这个 standalone 扩展的实现：
codex context meter 删除掉； 新窗口不是这个仓库时，状态栏直接显示 Ctx: no workspace =》要 tooltip 里写清楚当前绑定的是哪个 workspace 路径 =〉要 果你同时开两个窗口：两个窗口各自独立刷新，各看各自 workspace =》需要
已经改了，而且只改独立扩展。 现在的行为是：

decision.archive_summary: Earlier setup and detour around Project Assistant are resolved. The durable constraint is that this work must remain a standalone extension with clear boundaries from Project Assistant. A prior UI simplification decision was also made: one concise status-bar entry that opens a small detail window, with live-panel.md removed as the main entry.
decision.reasoning_summary: The active topic is still the same standalone VS Code extension behavior, specifically per-window workspace binding, no-workspace status text, and tooltip clarity. Raw context should keep the most recent turns about multi-window behavior and the latest requested changes (t9-t12). Older explanation about why Project Assistant was involved is resolved and no longer needed raw. The boundary rule from t5 should survive as a semantic pin even if its raw turn leaves the prompt.

applied.archiveSummary: Earlier setup and detour around Project Assistant are resolved. A prior UI simplification decision was also made: one concise status-bar entry that opens a small detail window, with live-panel.md removed as the main entry.

Older explanation about why Project Assistant was involved is resolved and no longer needed raw. The boundary rule from t5 should survive as a semantic pin even if its raw turn leaves the prompt.
